changelog:
- 矢量图处理速度大幅提升
- 改进 SVG 文件解析，支持更多格式特性
- 配方编辑器响应速度优化，支持包含更多颜色的图片
- 修复全局选色模式下无法取消选择的问题
- 修复特定颜色库组合下配方匹配失败的问题
changelog_en:
- Significantly faster vector image processing
- Improved SVG parsing with better format support
- Faster recipe editor with support for more colors
- Fixed deselect in global color-select mode
- Fixed recipe matching with certain color DB combinations
